mapper.select: SELECT pdf_id FROM tb_pdf WHERE pdf_id = #{pdfId} FOR UPDATE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_comment ( pdf_id, page_num, pos_x, pos_y, comment_text, user_id, status, comment_type, selected_text, rect_x, rect_y, rect_w, rect_h, drawing_path, comment_code ) VALUES ( #{pdfId}, #{pageNum}, #{posX}, #{posY}, #{commentText}, #{userId}, #{status}, #{commentType}, #{selectedText}, #{rectX}, #{rectY}, #{rectW}, #{rectH}, #{drawingPath}, #{commentCode} )

INSERT INTO tb_comment_attachment ( comment_id, reply_id, original_name, stored_name, content_type, file_size, uploader_id ) VALUES ( #{commentId}, #{replyId}, #{originalName}, #{storedName}, #{contentType}, #{fileSize}, #{uploaderId} )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_comment_attachment WHERE comment_id = #{commentId} AND reply_id IS NULL ORDER BY create_dt, attachment_id
SELECT * FROM tb_comment_attachment WHERE comment_id = #{commentId} ORDER BY create_dt, attachment_id
SELECT * FROM tb_comment_attachment WHERE reply_id = #{replyId} ORDER BY create_dt, attachment_id
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_comment SET rect_x = #{rectX}, rect_y = #{rectY}, rect_w = #{rectW}, rect_h = #{rectH}, update_dt = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE comment_id = #{commentId} AND user_id = #{userId} AND comment_type IN ('RECT', 'CALLOUT')
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_comment_reply WHERE comment_id = #{commentId} ORDER BY create_dt
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_comment_reply ( comment_id, reply_text, user_id ) VALUES ( #{commentId}, #{replyText}, #{userId} )
mapper.select: SELECT c.pdf_id FROM tb_comment_reply r JOIN tb_comment c ON c.comment_id = r.comment_id WHERE r.reply_id = #{replyId}
